_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of classification and control markings standards, policies and procedures.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of Data Protection Impact Assessment requirements, including regulatory triggers that mandate a DPIA, mandatory assessment elements, supervisory authority consultation obligations, and documentation standards.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-008 (RC, cosine: 0.507), SP-K-005 (SP, cosine: 0.492).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.438). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, standards]. DCWF-only terms [classification, control, markings, policies, procedures] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessment, authority, consultation, data, documentation, dpia] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.883, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.039 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.3%, N:53.3%, C:46.4%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of classification and control markings standards, policies and procedu" vs "Knowledge of Data Protection Impact Assessment requirements, including regulator" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.512 > STS 0.438 (gap +0.074). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, standards] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, standards]. DCWF-only: [classification, control, markings, policies, procedures]. WIDAI-only: [assessment, authority, consultation, data, documentation, dpia].
